comment.body: How do data providers like OptionsDepth calculate the intraday gamma exposure? How do they get that curved yellow line that represents the gamma trough?
comment.raw_body: How do data providers like OptionsDepth calculate the intraday gamma exposure? How do they get that curved yellow line that represents the gamma trough?

comment.body:
they get tape data, price paid, buy/sell sides, and from that you can inder the greeks, BSM if no divident, 100-step CRR if anything, current stock dividends and SOFR‑OIS interest rate inputs (i don't know their exact methodology, you should ask them)

gamm trough/peaks are basically just local zero speed lines. check the 3D map, and derivate it in your head, you will see
(my occassional zero speed lines are coming from net profiles)
comment.raw_body:
they get tape data, price paid, buy/sell sides, and from that you can inder the greeks, BSM if no divident, 100-step CRR if anything, current stock dividends and SOFR‑OIS interest rate inputs (i don't know their exact methodology, you should ask them)

gamm trough/peaks are basically just local zero speed lines. check the 3D map, and derivate it in your head, you will see
(my occassional zero speed lines are coming from net profiles)
